description: Use when designing UI components or layouts for Rock RMS using the Figma component library and design system

> **Path:** Design System

# Design System

![Figma](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

### Rock RMS Component Library

The Rock RMS Component Library contains the most common components used inside of Rock. It relies on the use of Figma components and styles to allow for the quick creation of new interface designs for Rock.

[View on Figma](https://www.figma.com/file/G3RXYkFDLRAJzXxKgtUCVSeZ/Rock-RMS-Component-Library)

<iframe width="800" height="450" src="https://www.figma.com/embed?embed_host=share&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.figma.com%2Ffile%2FG3RXYkFDLRAJzXxKgtUCVSeZ%2FRock-RMS-Component-Library%3Fnode-id%3D559%253A1600" allowfullscreen></iframe>
